name_cn:
Platinum Edition▪️ Authentic Quality Packaging as shown
Chane1 23P Spring/Summer Collection🍀
Double Pocket Retro Backpack Black♥ Small

Easy to maintain and durable, perfect for daily commuting and storage✔️

Leather: Haas medium calf leather
Dimensions: 17.5*16.5*10 CM
